title: microgramma nana
intro: Microgramma nana, also known as the Rattlesnake Fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Microgramma nana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to promote digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, and it is also valued for its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels.
